summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Pakistan should have UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 evidence, including the test summary made available through the transport chain. The evidence must match the shipped design type; material changes to cell supplier, chemistry, capacity, protection circuit, module layout, enclosure, or process should be reviewed before relying on an older report.
summary.zh: 运往巴基斯坦的锂电芯和电池应具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第III部分38.3小节证据，并在运输链中提供测试概要。证据必须匹配所运输的设计类型；如电芯供应商、化学体系、容量、保护电路、模组布局、外壳或工艺发生重大变更，应在继续使用旧报告前进行评审。
summary.zht: 運往巴基斯坦的鋰電芯和電池應具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第III部分38.3小節證據，並在運輸鏈中提供測試概要。證據必須匹配所運輸的設計類型；如電芯供應商、化學體系、容量、保護電路、模組佈局、外殼或工藝發生重大變更，應在繼續使用舊報告前進行評審。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
UN 38.3 test-summary availability through the transport chain

summary.en: China GB safety reports under GB 44240-2024 or GB/T 36276-2023 are product-safety evidence, not dangerous-goods transport evidence. Export files should reconcile China design-change records with the UN 38.3 tested design and the actual Pakistan-bound shipment.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023项下的中国GB安全报告是产品安全证据，不是危险货物运输证据。出口资料应将中国设计变更记录、UN 38.3已测设计和实际运往巴基斯坦的货批相互核对。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023項下的中國GB安全報告是產品安全證據，不是危險貨物運輸證據。出口資料應將中國設計變更記錄、UN 38.3已測設計和實際運往巴基斯坦的貨批相互核對。

gap.en: Merged former transport-1, transport-2, and transport-5: verify the report, test summary, manufacturer and model identity, design revision, and change-control bridge before booking. Classification, packing, SDS, and emergency information remain logistics documents for the actual route and carrier.
gap.zh: 已合并原transport-1、transport-2和transport-5：订舱前应核查报告、测试概要、制造商和型号一致性、设计版本以及变更控制桥接文件。分类、包装、SDS和应急信息仍应按实际路线和承运人准备物流文件。
gap.zht: 已合併原transport-1、transport-2和transport-5：訂艙前應核查報告、測試概要、製造商和型號一致性、設計版本以及變更控制橋接文件。分類、包裝、SDS和應急資訊仍應按實際路線和承運人準備物流文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery dangerous-goods transport where UN model rules and modal air, sea, road, port, carrier, customs, or freight-forwarder practice apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in practice for China export transport acceptance where lithium batteries are offered for transport under dangerous-goods rules

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan market-access evidence and China GB safety reports do not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence for lithium batteries.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦市场准入证据和中国GB安全报告不能替代锂电池UN 38.3运输证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦市場准入證據和中國GB安全報告不能替代鋰電池UN 38.3運輸證據。
